since_last: 92% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.88%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 92% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +1.25% · Gold -0.60% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 92% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.88%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.88%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.79%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.79%, PLTR +3.72%, ORCL +3.60%, AMAT +3.52%, LRCX +3.41%. Laggards: MU -0.25%, D -0.17%, DELL -0.15%, AAPL -0.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.06% at $156.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
